title: Famagusta, Famagusta District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Famagusta, Famagusta District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Famagusta is a city in Famagusta District with a population of 40,920. A historic city on the eastern coast with a stunning Venetian walled city, the Gothic St. Nicholas Cathedral, and the famous ghost town of Varosha.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
